name: Tiny Dino
description: A small, curious, and playful baby dinosaur who explores the world with wide-eyed wonder.

appearance.size: small - roughly the size of a golden retriever puppy

belly.pattern: solid yellow extending from the belly all the way up the front of the thin neck to the chin

eyes.description: huge expressive round eyes with bright green irises
eyes.color: bright green irises, big black pupils, and bright white sparkle highlights

appearance.teeth: small white teeth in a wide, friendly, curvy smile
appearance.arms: tiny T-rex arms with little fingers
appearance.legs: short chubby legs with small rounded toes
appearance.skin_texture: smooth, matte clay-like 3D texture, Pixar style
features: oversized head with a wide jaw
small green spikes running from the top of the head down the back to the tail

personality.voice_description: high-pitched squeaks, chirps, and happy roars - no human language
personality.communication: expressive body language, eye expressions, vocalizations
personality.humor_style: physical comedy, unexpected reactions, over-the-top expressions, slapstick

prompt_presets.base_description: Tiny Dino, cute baby green T-Rex, yellow belly, large expressive eyes, small arms, chubby body, Pixar-style 3D cartoon, vibrant colors, friendly smile, high-quality animated character

style_modifiers.default: 3D Pixar-style animation, soft studio lighting, vibrant colors, clean green background
style_modifiers.action: dynamic pose, motion blur, energetic, cinematic lighting
style_modifiers.emotional: exaggerated facial expression, close-up on face, expressive
style_modifiers.environment: rich detailed background, depth of field, stunning environment

mood_modifiers.happy: jumping with joy, tail wagging, eyes sparkling
mood_modifiers.curious: head tilted, leaning forward, nose sniffing
mood_modifiers.scared: trembling, wide eyes, hiding behind object
mood_modifiers.surprised: jaw dropped, eyes bulging, frozen in place
mood_modifiers.silly: goofy grin, crossed eyes, playful stance
